title: Theme Update Manifest
description: Centralized manifest listing all themes with version information for bulk update checking.

manifestVersion.description: Schema version of the manifest format.

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this manifest was generated.

manifestUrl.description: Self-referencing URL where this manifest is hosted.

themes.description: Map of theme filename stems to their metadata.

updateUrl.description: GitHub URL to the theme JSON file (auto-converted to raw by the tool).

file.description: Relative path to the theme file within the repository.
